heading: How
content:
Some Sentences using the word How?

  1. How is the Weather Today?

    Formal- Tharing ki Namshe khatem bay la

    Informal- same

  2. How are you going back home?

    Formal- Lhengay Zemkha khatay chenbo nangshey la

    Informal- Rang /chey khem na khatay lokshey

  3. How to write? - Khatay Dri-se?

  4. How to wash? - Khateb Khyu-shay?

  5. How do I reach MG Marg from here?- Na ley MG Marg khatey Lep shey?

  6. How do I put on the Tv? -TV di Khatey Chuk-do la? How put on

heading: Numbers ( 1-30)
content:
1

Chi

2

Nee

200- Gya Nee/ Ningya

300- Shum Gya

heading: Everyday Commonly Used Conversations
content:
The following conversation is between Sonam and Kelsang who run into each other. Since Kelsang is elder to Sonam the conversation is in the Formal/ Respectful Version.

Sonam- How are you? Lenghay Kuzu Dethang Yeka la?

Kelsang- Yes, I am Fine. Thank You. Lai la. Lhem ra Yeh?
